recommendations.title: Je Tu Il Elle
recommendations.overview: A woman suffers a subdued psychological breakdown in the wake of a devastating breakup.

recommendations.title: Spies in Disguise
recommendations.overview: Super spy Lance Sterling and scientist Walter Beckett are almost exact opposites. Lance is smooth, suave and debonair. Walter is… not. But what Walter lacks in social skills he makes up for in smarts and invention, creating the awesome gadgets Lance

recommendations.title: The Aura
recommendations.overview: A quiet, epileptic taxidermist plans the perfect crime. All he needs is the right opportunity. An accident, perhaps…

recommendations.title: Mystic River
recommendations.overview: The lives of three men who were childhood friends are shattered when one of them suffers a family tragedy.

recommendations.title: Starstruck
recommendations.overview: Pop star Christopher Wilde has fame, fortune and a big-budget Hollywood movie awaiting him. But after meeting Jessica Olson, a down-to-earth girl from the Midwest, he is faced with following his heart or doing what's best for his career.

recommendations.title: France
recommendations.overview: A celebrity journalist, juggling her busy career and personal life, has her life over-turned by a freak car accident.

recommendations.title: Place publique
recommendations.overview: Revolves around Castro, who was once a very famous TV host, but as he grows old, his popularity is dwindling.

recommendations.title: Break
recommendations.overview: Lucie, a young dancer suffers an accident. When she wakes up from a coma, she and her partner start training for a dance show. On the way, she starts looking for her estranged father, a path that might lead her to life-changing love.

recommendations.title: Tall Girl 2
recommendations.overview: After Jodi Kreyman gains popularity, her miscommunications start causing rifts with those around her and now she really needs to "stand tall".

recommendations.title: Ghislain Lambert's Bicycle
recommendations.overview: In the 70s, there was Merckx and there were the others. Ghislain Lambert was one of the others. This is his story, a quite simple one. The story of a modest Belgian bike racer. His greatest ambition in life? To become a champion. His greatest tragedy
